variables.notes: Bank/financial-institution statement of financial position does not present a current/non-current split; no total current assets line identified.

candidates.why: Balance sheet line whose values exactly match cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period in the cash flow statement; for banks this often represents cash/bank balances and placements with credit institutions.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Explicit cash and cash equivalents label, but on cash flow rather than balance sheet.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the CHE shortlist because target prefers a balance-sheet cash line, and this balance-sheet row matches the cash flow ending cash values exactly.
No total current liabilities line identified; bank-format balance sheet is not classified into current/non-current.
No clean short-term borrowings/current maturities line identified. Excluded lease obligations per rule; deposits and other liabilities are not STD.
No taxes payable/current tax liabilities line found. 'Income Tax' appears on the asset side and is not taxes payable.

candidates.why: Most likely net carrying amount of property, plant and equipment; preferred over gross line for PPEGT.
Explicit PPE label but gross rather than net; less preferred.

variables.notes: Preferred net/total tangible fixed assets over gross PPE line.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the malformed label, the values behave like net cash from operating activities and precede investing cash flow lines.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Label appears concatenated/misparsed, but this is the operating cash flow subtotal.
